Metropolitan and micropolitan statistical areas (metro and micro areas) are geographic entities 
defined by the U.S. Office of Management and Budget (OMB). The term "Core Based Statistical Area" 
(CBSA) is a collective term for both metro and micro areas. A metro area contains a core urban area of 
50,000 or more population, and a micro area contains an urban core of at least 10,000 (but less than 
50,000) population. Each metro or micro area consists of one or more counties
